texto: If the people of this religion are asked about the proof for the soundness of their religion, they flare up, get angry and spill the blood of whoever confronts them with this question. They forbid rational speculation, and strive to kill their adversaries. This is why truth became thoroughly silenced and concealed.
explicacao: Citação de Muhammad ibn Zakariya al-Razi sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “If the people of this religion are asked about the proof for the soundness of their religion, the…” articula reflexao, anger, islam em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao-noturna e islam.
